name: Hacker News Reader
description: Browse and search Hacker News top stories, new posts, and discussions.
long_description: Access Hacker News directly from Row-Bot. Browse the front page, discover new posts, search the HN archive via Algolia, and read story details with top comments. No API key is required.

default_count.label: Default number of stories
default_count.description: How many stories to fetch per request (1-30).
